hero.headline: Connect. Invite.
hero.subheadline: InvestConnect makes it effortless to manage events and invite the right people — all in one place.

benefits.title: Why InvestConnect?
benefits.subtitle: Everything you need to run seamless events

items.title: Effortless Event Creation
items.description: Create and manage events in minutes with our intuitive interface designed for busy professionals.

items.title: Smart Invitations
items.description: Invite the right people with targeted invitations and track RSVPs in real time.

items.title: Automated Reminders
items.description: Never miss a follow-up. Automated notifications keep your guests informed and engaged.

items.title: Insightful Analytics
items.description: Understand attendance trends and optimize future events with powerful reporting tools.

items.title: Secure & Private
items.description: Enterprise-grade security ensures your guest lists and event data stay protected.

items.title: Lightning Fast
items.description: A blazing-fast platform that scales with your events — from intimate dinners to large conferences.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to your next great event

steps.title: Create Your Event
steps.description: Set your date, location, and agenda. Customize every detail to match your vision.

steps.title: Invite Your Guests
steps.description: Select contacts, send personalized invitations, and manage your guest list with ease.

steps.title: Track & Engage
steps.description: Monitor RSVPs, send reminders, and keep guests excited leading up to your event.

items.name: Sarah Mitchell
items.quote: InvestConnect has transformed how I manage client events. The invitation tracking alone has saved me hours each week.

items.name: James Okafor
items.quote: The platform is intuitive and polished. Our investor dinners have never been so well-coordinated.

items.name: Priya Nair
items.quote: From small gatherings to large conferences, InvestConnect handles it all without breaking a sweat.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Events?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of professionals already using InvestConnect.
